findings.summary: Missing required test: 'startup waits for failed repository result before admission'.
findings.suggested_fix: Add the missing test to verify that the startup barrier waits for all repository results even if one fails.

findings.summary: The 'worker start' command does not perform the initial recovery barrier before starting the scheduler.
findings.suggested_fix: Add 'await c.buildRepositorySweepCoordinator().execute(...)' before 'await scheduler.run(...)' in the 'worker start' command handler.
